"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); function dehydrateSsrMatchId(id) { return id.replaceAll("/", "\0"); } function hydrateSsrMatchId(id) { return id.replaceAll("\0", "/").replaceAll("�", "/"); } exports.dehydrateSsrMatchId = dehydrateSsrMatchId; exports.hydrateSsrMatchId = hydrateSsrMatchId; //# sourceMappingURL=ssr-match-id.cjs.map
